title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that AI struggles to reliably edit structured documents like .docx files because documents function as software with internal logic and rules, not plain text. Humans can edit individual documents safely while AI requires treating documents as software to scale edits across thousands of files without breaking formatting or relationships.
